name: update_contact
description: Updates one or more fields on an existing CRM contact record identified by contact_id. Only provided fields within the updates object are modified; omitted fields remain unchanged.

contact_id.description: The unique identifier of the CRM contact record to update.
contact_id.$comment: Opaque string ID assigned at creation. Attempting to update a non-existent ID returns a 404 error.

updates.description: An object containing the fields to update on the contact. Only include fields that need to change.

email.description: New primary email address for the contact.
email.$comment: Updating email may trigger duplicate detection if the new address belongs to another record.

phone.description: New phone number in E.164 international format.
phone.$comment: E.164 format required for SMS/call tool compatibility.

company.description: Updated company or organization name for the contact.
company.$comment: Free-text; does not automatically create or link a CRM company entity.

job_title.description: Updated job title or role for the contact.
job_title.$comment: Reflects role changes; prior values are preserved in audit history.

tags.description: Replacement list of tags for the contact. Overwrites the existing tag set entirely.
tags.$comment: Full replacement semantics (not additive) for tags. Send existing tags plus new ones to append.

updates.$comment: Strict additionalProperties:false prevents passing unknown field names that would silently fail.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the update, recorded in the contact's audit log.
examples: Tags updated after Q3 segmentation review.
reason.$comment: Stored in immutable audit log for compliance and traceability. Not shown to the contact.
